patent_context.patent_title: Wearable fitness tracker with biometric authentication module
patent_context.claim_description: A wearable fitness tracker comprising a heart rate sensor, a biometric authentication module adapted to verify user identity, and a wireless data transmission unit configured to transmit health data to a paired device

claims.claim_text: A wearable fitness tracker comprising a heart rate sensor, a biometric authentication module adapted to verify user identity, and a wireless data transmission unit configured to transmit health data to a paired device

structured_elements.text: biometric authentication module adapted to verify user identity
wireless data transmission unit configured to transmit health data to a paired device

claims.accused_product_description: The FitBand X200 is a wearable fitness band with an optical heart rate sensor, a PIN-based lock screen, Bluetooth connectivity that syncs daily step and heart rate summaries to a phone app.

element_mapping_facts.e1: FitBand X200 is a wearable fitness tracker — matched
element_mapping_facts.e2: Optical heart rate sensor present — matched
element_mapping_facts.e3: PIN-based lock screen — unclear if this is a 'biometric authentication module' — no biometric sensing present
element_mapping_facts.e4: Bluetooth syncs data to phone — may or may not constitute a 'wireless data transmission unit' as a distinct component

claims.disputed_element_notes: The term 'biometric authentication module' is disputed — the accused product uses PIN-based authentication, not biometrics. Under a broad reading, any user verification mechanism might suffice; under a narrow reading, biometric sensing hardware is required. The term 'wireless data transmission unit' is also contested — is Bluetooth data sync via a phone app the same as a dedicated transmission unit?
claims.specification_notes: The specification describes fingerprint and heart-rate-pattern biometric authentication and a dedicated Bluetooth Low Energy transceiver module for continuous health data streaming.
